title: Local Government : Subsidiary Legislation : North East District Council (refuse) Bye-laws
title_en: Local Government : Subsidiary Legislation : North East District Council (refuse) Bye-laws

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
These Bye-laws may be cited as the North East District Council ( Refuse ) Bye-laws*.
*Originally made under the Township Act now repealed, these regulations have been continued under s 94(2) of the Local Government Act, 2013.

provisions.title: Application
provisions.content:
2. Application
These Bye-laws shall apply to all villages within the jurisdiction of the North East District Council.

provisions.title: Interpretation

definitions.definition: the Council Secretary or any other officer of the Council authorised in writing by the Council Secretary to perform the duties under the Bye-laws
an officer from the Bye-law Enforcement Unit at the Council established in accordance with section 40A of Local Government (District Councils) Act
